title: palicourea alpina var. eriantha
intro: Palicourea alpina var. eriantha, also known as the Amazonian palicourea, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the Amazon rainforest. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Palicourea alpina var. eriantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
